title: Vanity: Just Swords
description: Vanity addon focusing primarily on delivering variety of sword designs, both historical and fantasy, to the table!
body:
Vanity: Just Swords is an addon for Vanity mod that focuses on enhancing your experience with game aesthetics by bringing to you more than a hundred of sword designs to choose from. So you could slash, hack and thrust to your heart's content ^^

A bit fancier page coming later, as mod is not yet fully released. It contains **almost** everything that was planned for 1.0, but I'm just really tempted to finally share it and collect feedback, so 1.0 is coming whenever I wrap my head around some issues present and are blocking progress
